channel.title: q-fin.PR updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: q-fin.PR updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Quantitative Universal Approximation for Noisy Quantum Neural Networks
item.description: arXiv:2604.02064v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We provide here a universal approximation theorem with precise quantitative error bounds for noisy quantum neural networks. We focus on applications to Quantitative Finance, where target functions are often given as expectations. We further provide a detailed numerical analysis, testing our results on actual noisy quantum hardware.
item.dc:creator: Lukas Gonon, Antoine Jacquier, Marcel Mordarski
